description: Jazz, Blues and the sweet notes in between Maureen Washington is the Winner of the 2014 Black Canadian Award for Best Jazz and Soul Artist! A consummate performer, she slips easily from sassy to sexy within a single line of lyrics, at times echoing the haunting tones of Etta James and Carmen McRae, then faster than the mind and ear can make the transition, Maureen Washington exudes the impish irreverence of Jann Arden and the vocal agility of Holly Cole. With all splendor attached to such comparisons, Maureen’s musical style remains distinctly her own. Her vocal diversity lends itself to performances of blues, swing jazz and funk , and her versatile repertoire, ranges from classics to lively originals. https://www.maureenwashington.ca

description: Six Paxx - Experience the hottest live show in the country. SIXX PAXX is a popular male revue show known for its acrobatic performances and entertainment. The show is currently on tour across Germany, Austria, and Switzerland, featuring a mix of choreography and audience interaction.
